goals.title: Goals
goals.name: Name
savings.title: Savings
savings.disclaimer: Informational overview of instrument classes, not individual investment advice. Verify specific banks, issuers, and terms yourself.
savings.footer.includeYield: Include accrued interest in balance at voyage
savings.instrument.name: Name
savings.picker.hint: Tap a template to learn more
savings.picker.title: Add instrument
savings.status.earlyWithdraw: Term ends {date} — early withdrawal at voyage forfeits interest
savings.status.maturedAt: Matured before today — update Assets to reflect payout
savings.templates.corp_bond.details: Bonds issued by Russian corporations. Higher yield than OFZ, with credit risk. Treated as simple-interest paying at maturity.
savings.templates.corp_bond.name: Corporate bond
savings.templates.custom.details: A blank instrument where you specify rate, term, and compounding manually. Use this when your bank's offer doesn't fit any template.
savings.templates.custom.name: Custom
savings.templates.mm_fund.details: A mutual fund of short-term money-market instruments. Daily compounding, no fixed term, slightly higher than a savings account.
savings.templates.mm_fund.name: Money-market fund
savings.templates.ofz_pd.details: Russian federal bonds with a fixed coupon. Treated here as a simple-interest instrument paying at maturity. Buy on MOEX.
savings.templates.ofz_pd.name: OFZ-PD
savings.templates.ofz_pk.details: Russian federal bonds with a floating coupon tied to RUONIA. Treated here as a fixed-rate approximation at the rate you enter.
savings.templates.ofz_pk.name: OFZ-PK
savings.templates.savings_account.detail: An on-demand bank account that pays daily interest. Open-ended — no maturity. Lowest rate of the deposit family but maximum flexibility.
savings.templates.savings_account.name: Savings account
savings.templates.term_deposit.details: A bank deposit locked for a fixed period. Interest compounds monthly. Higher rate than a savings account, but early withdrawal may forfeit accrued interest.
savings.templates.term_deposit.name: Term deposit
savings.zeroState.body: Park money in deposits or bonds to grow it before the voyage. The amount you commit is deducted from your wallet — accrued interest adds to balance at voyage.
chart.title: Balance over time
breakdown.title: Monthly
pdf.title: Vacation budget
